span.p:
USER QUESTION ---
Natural language staffing request
(Streamlit UI / CLI)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CLASSIFY_QUERY NODE ---
LangGraph
Routes:
staffing · skill · availability
gap · scenario · out‑of‑scope

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EVIDENCE ROUTING ---
Selects RAG, SQL, or hybrid path

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CHROMADB / RAG ---
Narrative context
(Employee bios, projects, notes, Jira)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SQLITE / STRUCTURED QUERY ---
Exact workforce facts
(Skills, allocations, FTE, dates)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SYNTHESIS NODE ---
LLM uses RAG + SQL evidence
to generate recommendation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STRUCTURED STAFFING ANSWER ---
Recommendation
Gap labels · Risks · Citations

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
EXPANDED EVALS ---
Query accuracy · Recall
Fact accuracy · Answer quality
